harness_failures: A pre-Sonnet wrapper attempt for run 1 failed in zsh because shell quoting broke the command assembly; the actual validation call was rerun with bash before any Claude init event was reached.
one_line_reason: 1차는 Angular benchmark data까지 찾아가 핵심 지연 재동기화 규칙을 거의 회수했지만 주입기/teardown 대비를 놓쳤고, 2차는 저장소를 잘못 매핑해 지식 답변으로 후퇴했습니다.
